name: Ahere
bio: A ghost from the past, Ahere was once Aluccard's mentor -- until a falling-out forced Aluccard to end his mentor's life. That was thousands of years ago, and from the looks of things, Ahere took it personally.

Now seemingly returned from the dead, Ahere is fixed on a single burning desire: revenge. Aluccard could hardly believe his eyes seeing his former master again, back from beyond the grave and equipped, this time, with modern weapons. How he returned remains a mystery. What he intends to do about it does not.
